## Entities.Ingredient type

Discriminated union of all ingredient types

**Signature:**

```typescript
export type Ingredient = IChocolateIngredient | ISugarIngredient | IDairyIngredient | IFatIngredient | IAlcoholIngredient | IIngredient;
```
